prompt: Check if this PR title follows our naming convention: [TEAM-42] feat: add user authentication
expected_output: The title is valid. It follows the format [TEAM-<number>] <type>: <description>.
assertions: contains 'valid' or contains 'Valid' or contains '✅' or contains 'correct' or contains 'follows'

prompt: Is this PR title correct? 'fix: resolve login bug'
expected_output: Invalid. Missing ticket number. Should be [TEAM-<number>] fix: resolve login bug.
assertions: contains 'invalid' or contains 'Invalid' or contains '❌' or contains 'missing' or contains 'TEAM'

prompt: Check this PR title: [TEAM-99] yolo: ship it fast
expected_output: Invalid. 'yolo' is not a valid type. Valid types are: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore.
assertions: contains 'invalid' or contains 'Invalid' or contains 'not' or contains 'yolo'

prompt: Is this branch name following our convention? platform/TEAM-42-add-auth
expected_output: Valid branch name. Follows the <team>/<ticket>-<description> format.
assertions: contains 'valid' or contains 'Valid' or contains '✅' or contains 'correct' or contains 'follows'

expected_output: Invalid. Missing TEAM ticket number. Should be <team>/TEAM-<number>-<description>.
assertions: contains 'invalid' or contains 'Invalid' or contains '❌' or contains 'missing' or contains 'TEAM' or contains 'format'

prompt: My PR title is 'added login feature for TEAM-42'. Can you fix it to follow our naming convention?
